title: BSNC Director Ryan Announces Resignation
summary: Former Chair and longtime BSNC director Lee Ryan announced at the December meeting of the BSNC Board of Directors that he was resigning from the BSNC Board to devote his full-time attention to the further growth and development of Ryan Air, recently acquired by Saltchuk. “My role as President of Rya...

title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: January 5, 2023
summary: January 5, 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice has continued to increase and at a bit greater rate than last week, of 1.90% , from the level on 12/29/2022 of 12.597 M km 2 to 12.841 M km 2 for this week.
